pain_points: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements
Unclear size guide and fit information
Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")
Limited image zoom / lack of 360° view
Insufficient contrast for text on background banners

Onboarding.description: First‑time visitors see a generic homepage with promotional carousels that distract from the product intent, increasing bounce risk.
Onboarding.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Onboarding.issue: Forced login prompt before exploring product details
Onboarding.description: Users are asked to sign in or create an account before they can view full specifications, breaking the principle of minimal friction.
Onboarding.pain_point: Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")

Exploration.issue: Insufficient product imagery and zoom functionality
Exploration.description: Only a static thumbnail loads initially; users must click to view larger images, which load slowly and lack a hover‑zoom or 360° view.
Exploration.pain_point: Limited image zoom / lack of 360° view

Exploration.issue: Size and fit information is buried in a small link
Exploration.description: The size guide is a tiny text link that opens a new tab, causing context loss and confusion about fit.
Exploration.pain_point: Unclear size guide and fit information

Exploration.issue: Discount and price display lacks hierarchy
Exploration.description: Original price, discount percentage, and final price are presented in similar font sizes, making it hard to scan the value proposition.
Exploration.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Exploration.issue: Low contrast between promotional badges and background
Exploration.description: Badges like "Free Shipping" use light yellow text on white background, violating WCAG contrast ratios.
Exploration.pain_point: Insufficient contrast for text on background banners

Conversion.issue: Add‑to‑Cart button placement conflicts with sticky header
Conversion.description: On scroll, the sticky header obscures the primary CTA, causing accidental clicks on navigation links.
Conversion.pain_point: Inconsistent button labeling (e.g., "Buy Now" vs "Add to Cart")

Conversion.issue: Shipping cost appears only after address entry
Conversion.description: Users discover additional shipping fees late in the checkout flow, leading to cart abandonment.

Conversion.issue: Limited payment options displayed without icons
Conversion.description: Only generic text lists payment methods, reducing trust for users who look for recognizable logos.

Retention.issue: Order tracking link is hidden in a dropdown menu
Retention.description: Post‑purchase users struggle to locate their order status, decreasing perceived service quality.

Retention.issue: No proactive re‑engagement (e.g., related product suggestions) on the confirmation page
Retention.description: Missed opportunity to encourage repeat purchases or cross‑sell.
Retention.pain_point: Cluttered product page with too many competing elements

Support.issue: Help/FAQ link is placed at the bottom of the page in small font
Support.description: Users seeking immediate assistance must scroll far, violating the principle of easy error recovery.

Support.issue: Live chat icon is not keyboard‑focusable
Support.description: Keyboard‑only users cannot activate the support chat, breaching accessibility standards.

insights: Heuristic violations cluster around visibility of system status, consistency, and error prevention, especially during the conversion phase.
Performance bottlenecks (slow image load) directly impact perceived credibility and increase bounce/abandon rates on mobile.
Accessibility gaps (contrast, alt‑text, keyboard navigation) reduce reach for users with disabilities and may lead to legal compliance risks.

recommendations.suggestion: Implement a responsive image carousel with lazy‑loading, hover‑zoom, and optional 360° view.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use srcset and picture elements; integrate a lightweight JS carousel library; test on low‑bandwidth connections.

recommendations.suggestion: Redesign the size guide as an inline modal with clear measurement charts and fit tips.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Trigger modal on click; ensure focus trapping for accessibility; add ARIA labels.

recommendations.suggestion: Standardize CTA labeling (e.g., always use "Add to Cart") and place the primary button above sticky headers.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update component library; add CSS margin to prevent overlap; run A/B test for wording impact.

recommendations.suggestion: Show estimated shipping cost and delivery time early, before address entry.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage ZIP‑code lookup API; display a concise banner under price.

recommendations.suggestion: Improve visual hierarchy: larger font for discounted price, distinct color for original price (strikethrough), and highlight savings percentage.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update CSS variables; conduct usability testing for readability.

recommendations.suggestion: Audit and fix WCAG contrast issues; add descriptive alt‑text to all product images.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Run automated contrast checker; create alt‑text guidelines; integrate into CMS workflow.

recommendations.suggestion: Make support chat icon keyboard‑focusable and surface FAQ link in a sticky footer.
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add tabindex="0" and ARIA role="button"; ensure focus outline is visible.

pain_points: Cognitive overload due to excessive sections
Mandatory login before seeing total cost

Onboarding.description: The title includes brand, model, and promotional text, making it hard to quickly grasp the product type on first glance
Onboarding.pain_point: Users cannot rapidly assess relevance, leading to higher bounce

Onboarding.description: No prominent badge summarizing key attributes (e.g., filter type, compatibility) near the title
Onboarding.pain_point: Users spend extra time searching for basic info

Exploration.issue: Scattered specifications across tabs and bullet lists
Exploration.description: Core specs (size, material, lifespan) are hidden in separate sections requiring multiple clicks
Exploration.pain_point: Increases cognitive load and slows decision making

Exploration.description: Carousel navigation relies on mouse hover, lacking ARIA roles and focus indicators
Exploration.pain_point: Accessibility barrier for keyboard and screen‑reader users

Exploration.description: Paragraphs are dense with marketing copy, making it hard to scan for technical details

Conversion.description: Discounted price, MRP, and savings are displayed in different font sizes without clear labeling
Conversion.pain_point: Users doubt price legitimacy, leading to cart abandonment

Conversion.description: Estimated delivery date appears only after clicking ‘Add to Cart’, not on the product page
Conversion.pain_point: Uncertainty about shipping time reduces purchase intent

Conversion.description: Total cost, taxes, and payment options are hidden until the user logs in

Retention.issue: No easy reorder or ‘Buy again’ shortcut
Retention.description: After purchase, the product page does not surface a quick reorder button or related accessories
Recommendations are generic and not based on the filter’s category or past purchases

Support.issue: Return policy buried in footer links
Support.description: Information about returns and warranty is not visible on the product page, requiring navigation to separate pages
Support.pain_point: Users feel unsupported when issues arise

Support.description: Customer questions are displayed in a linear list without a search/filter function
Support.pain_point: Hard to find relevant answers, increasing support tickets

insights: Users on Amazon perform rapid scan; clear visual hierarchy and concise key specs are essential for conversion
Trust signals such as seller rating, warranty badge, and transparent pricing directly impact purchase confidence
Mobile traffic accounts for >60% of visits; touch targets and layout must meet accessibility standards to prevent drop‑off
Progressive disclosure (e.g., collapsible spec sections) reduces cognitive load while keeping detailed info available
Post‑purchase engagement (order follow‑up, easy reorder) drives repeat purchases in appliance accessories

recommendations.suggestion: Introduce a sticky ‘Add to Cart’ button with price, rating, and delivery estimate visible on scroll
recommendations.implementation_notes: Use fixed positioning; pull delivery estimate via API; ensure contrast meets WCAG AA

recommendations.suggestion: Create a concise ‘Key Specs’ card directly under the title summarizing filter type, dimensions, lifespan, and compatibility
recommendations.implementation_notes: Design as a responsive grid; populate from product metadata; keep to 3‑4 lines

recommendations.suggestion: Consolidate price information into a single line with clear labels (e.g., ‘Deal Price: ₹X (Save ₹Y, 20% off)’ )
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update template; add tooltip for savings breakdown

recommendations.suggestion: Make the image carousel fully keyboard and screen‑reader accessible (ARIA roles, focusable controls, alt text per image)
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add tabindex, ARIA‑labelled buttons; test with NVDA/VoiceOver

recommendations.suggestion: Add a visible ‘Return & Warranty’ badge linking to policy, and surface seller rating next to the title
recommendations.implementation_notes: Design badge icons; pull seller rating via API; ensure mobile size

recommendations.suggestion: Implement a ‘Buy Again’ widget on the order confirmation page and in the user’s purchase history
recommendations.implementation_notes: Leverage existing recommendation engine; place CTA with one‑click reorder

recommendations.suggestion: Introduce a searchable Q&A component with filter by keyword and helpfulness rating
recommendations.implementation_notes: Add input field; index existing Q&A; sort by relevance

recommendations.suggestion: Optimize mobile layout: increase touch target size to minimum 48 dp, use single‑column flow, and lazy‑load images
recommendations.implementation_notes: Update CSS breakpoints; audit via Google Lighthouse mobile scores

Exploration.KPI: Average Scroll Depth to ‘Key Specs’ card
Exploration.goal: Achieve 80% of users reaching the card

Retention.KPI: Repeat Purchase Rate for filter accessories

Support.KPI: Support Ticket Volume related to product info
